featureFlags.title: Feature flags
featureFlags.empty: No feature flags yet — click "+ New flag" to create one.
featureFlags.confirmDeleteMessage: Delete the feature flag "{{ key }}"? This also removes all its rules.
featureFlags.confirmEnableNoRulesMessage: The flag "{{ key }}" has no include rules, so enabling it turns the feature ON for every signed-in user (and all anonymous visitors when it is public). Continue?
featureFlags.errorRulesFailedCreate: Flag "{{ key }}" created, but rules failed to save. Reopen to retry.
featureFlags.errorRulesFailedUpdate: Flag "{{ key }}" updated, but rules failed to save. Reopen to retry.
featureFlags.rulesFailedTooltip: Rules failed to save — reopen the flag to retry.

featureFlagForm.keyHint: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens. Example: new-dashboard
featureFlagForm.publicHint: Visibility to anonymous (logged-out) visitors only. Targeting is controlled by rules. An enabled flag with no include rules is on for every signed-in user.
featureFlagForm.rulesEmpty: No rules — the flag will use only its enabled state and environment list.

featureFlagPreview.title: Preview
featureFlagPreview.description: Run a dry evaluation against a synthetic context to verify rules before flipping the flag.
featureFlagPreview.userPlaceholder: Search by name, email or ID — leave empty for guest

reason.noRulesDefaultOn: No include rules — defaults to on

featureFlagRule.effectHint: Include adds matching users; Exclude removes them from the flag.
featureFlagRule.usersPlaceholder: Search by name, email or ID

roles.title: Roles management
roles.actionsHiddenSuperReason: Super roles are managed at the system level and cannot be modified via the admin UI
roles.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the role "{{ name }}"?

roleForm.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 50 characters
roleForm.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 255 characters

conditionBuilder.emptyGroup: No rules yet — click + to add one
conditionBuilder.parseError: Cannot parse into visual builder — fix JSON or stay in raw mode

rolePermissions.title: Permissions: {{ name }}
rolePermissions.readonlyAccess: You have read-only access to this role's permissions.
rolePermissions.selectToConfig: Select permissions on the left to configure conditions
rolePermissions.conditionsHint: Optionally restrict each permission with one or more conditions. All active conditions are combined (AND logic).
rolePermissions.ownershipHint: — record field must equal the current user's ID
rolePermissions.ownershipFieldHint: The field on the record that must equal the current user's ID
rolePermissions.fieldMatchHint: — record field must be one of the specified values
rolePermissions.userAttributeHint: — record field must equal a property of the current user
rolePermissions.customHint: — raw MongoDB query merged into conditions
rolePermissions.invalidFieldMatchShape: Each key must map to a non-empty array of values, e.g. { "status": ["active"] }
rolePermissions.invalidUserAttrShape: Each key must map to a user attribute name string, e.g. { "ownerId": "id" }
rolePermissions.invalidOwnershipField: Field name must be a non-empty string
rolePermissions.effectDenyHint: — inverts the rule; revokes matching access from broader allow rules (e.g. allow update:Article + deny update:Article when published=true)
rolePermissions.effectDenyBadgeHint: This permission is a deny rule — it revokes matching access granted by other rules
rolePermissions.errorLoadFailed: Failed to load permissions. Please try again.

resources.title: Resources
resources.orphanedRegisteredTooltip: Controller removed — click Restore to re-enable permissions
resources.orphanedUnregisteredTooltip: Controller not found in code — restore the @RegisterResource controller first

resourceForm.displayNameMaxLength: Display name must be at most 100 characters
resourceForm.defaultActionsHint: All default actions are shown: create, read, update, delete, search.

actions.title: Actions
actions.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the action "{{ name }}"?

actionForm.nameImmutableHint: Internal name cannot be changed after creation
actionForm.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 50 characters
actionForm.namePattern: Must start with a letter; only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores allowed
actionForm.displayNameMaxLength: Display name must be at most 100 characters
actionForm.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 500 characters

store.errorLoadRolesFailed: Failed to load roles. Please try again.
store.errorLoadResourcesFailed: Failed to load resources. Please try again.
store.errorLoadActionsFailed: Failed to load actions. Please try again.

billing.cancelPeriodEndMessage: The subscription stays active until the end of the current period, then will not renew.
billing.cancelImmediateMessage: The subscription is canceled immediately and access is revoked now. This cannot be undone.
billing.refundMessage: Refund the full amount ({{ amount }}) for this invoice? This cannot be undone.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load billing data. Please try again.
errors.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel the subscription. Please try again.
errors.refundFailed: Failed to refund the invoice. Please try again.
